2604.01195.title: ORBIT: Scalable and Verifiable Data Generation for Search Agents on a Tight Budget
2604.01195.paper_summary: Search agents, which integrate language models (LMs) with web search, are becoming crucial for answering complex user queries. Constructing training datasets for deep research tasks, involving multi-step retrieval and reasoning, remains challenging due to expensive human annotation, or cumbersome prerequisites. In this work, we introduce ORBIT, a training dataset with 20K reasoning-intensive queries with short verifiable answers, generated using a frugal framework without relying on paid API services. The modular framework relies on four stages: seed creation, question--answer pair generation, and two stages of verification: self and external. ORBIT spans 15 domains and each training pair requires 4--5 reasoning steps, with external search verification required from the complete web. We train Qwen3-4B as the base model on ORBIT using GRPO and evaluate it on Wikipedia question answering tasks. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that ORBIT-4B achieves strong performance among sub-4B LLMs as search agents, proving the utility of synthetic datasets. Our framework, code and datasets are open-sourced and available publicly.
2604.01195.paper_summary_zh: 搜尋代理整合了語言模型（LMs）與網路搜尋，對於回答複雜的用戶查詢變得至關重要。構建用於深度研究任務的訓練數據集，涉及多步檢索和推理，仍然面臨昂貴的人為標註或繁瑣的前置條件的挑戰。在這項工作中，我們介紹了 ORBIT，一個包含 20K 具有推理強度的查詢和短可驗證答案的訓練數據集，該數據集是使用一個節儉的框架生成的，並不依賴於付費 API 服務。這個模組化框架依賴於四個階段：種子創建、問題-答案對生成，以及兩個驗證階段：自我驗證和外部驗證。ORBIT 涵蓋 15 個領域，每個訓練對需要 4-5 步推理，並且需要從完整的網路進行外部搜尋驗證。我們使用 GRPO 在 ORBIT 上訓練 Qwen3-4B 作為基礎模型，並在維基百科問答任務上進行評估。大量實驗結果顯示，ORBIT-4B 在 sub-4B LLMs 作為搜尋代理中表現強勁，證明了合成數據集的實用性。我們的框架、代碼和數據集都是開源的，並公開提供。
2604.01195.author: Nandan Thakur et.al.
2604.01195.authors: Nandan Thakur, Zijian Chen, Xueguang Ma, Jimmy Lin
